search_query:
index=main sourcetype=_json _index_earliest=-1m
| rex field=_raw "(?<method>GET|POST) (?<uri_path>[^\s]+).*?(?<status>\d{3})"
| where match(uri_path, "/(login|signin|auth)([/?]|$)")
  AND method="GET"
  AND status="301"
| eval rule="A04", sev="Medium"
| table _time, src_ip, uri_path, status, rule, sev
